subcodes.first_line: O Father of Martyrs! It behooveth thee to glory in the company of the pure ones, and to attain unto everlasting honour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پدر شهیدان ترا سزاوار که بر گروه اصفیا افتخار نماای و بعزت پایدار سر
subcodes.subjects: @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
